name: chat-target-labels-ko
description: Replace the in-world chat target button labels at their real client consumption point without changing any server records.
verified: GDI trace g019-gdi-chat-label-pointers.json showed FUN_005159e0 consuming three heap string objects through VA 0x00516038 -> 0x00516044: e585a857 (intended 全体), e889a66c (intended 艦隊), e5908ce999a3 (intended 同陣営). The heap strings are malformed UTF-8 fragments fed into the ANSI conversion path. This patch detours only that call-site, maps the three stack label slots esp+0x30/0x34/0x38 to CP949 static labels 전체/함대/아군, and leaves the original heap objects/destructors untouched.

patches.note: FUN_005159e0 chat target label conversion: detour current-label selection/conversion to the static CP949 label trampoline.
Trampoline plus CP949 static labels at VA 0x0076e76e=전체, 0x0076e776=함대, 0x0076e77e=아군.
